arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag cites Liverpool example ahead of Man Utd's Carabao Cup opener
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is determined for Manchester United to take the Carabao Cup seriously, citing Liverpool's victory last season as an example that all clubs want to win the trophy. Ten Hag delivered the Carabao Cup during his first year as United boss in 2022/23, but the competition is often viewed by fans as less prestigious or a lower priority when directly compared to the Premier League, FA Cup or European tournaments.

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Barnsley LIVE! Carabao Cup match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Red Devils look to book fourth-round spot as they host League One opposition at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Ten Hag learning from Antony transfer mistake at Man Utd
arts.sum: With only eight goal contributions in 54 games, Antony appears to have lost his starting role to Amad Diallo, with the Brazilian seeing just one minute of Premier League football in United’s opening four games. The emergence of Diallo has also showcased what United were missing down their right flank, with the 22-year-old already providing half of Antony’s total goal contributions in just six Premier League starts.

arts.ttl: MAN UNITED CONFIDENTIAL: Instinctive Andre Onana is living up to his Italian nickname, former youth coach laments star's summer exit - and it's back to school for Kobbie Mainoo
arts.sum: MAN UNITED CONFIDENTIAL: Goalkeepers normally do their homework on potential penalty-takes - but Onana was nearly caught out by Cameron Archer

arts.ttl: Adrien Rabiot transfer collapsed over mother's unusual request for Man Utd target
arts.sum: France midfielder Adrien Rabiot was linked with clubs in the Premier League and La Liga after leaving Juventus but was made to wait a while to complete his next move

arts.ttl: 'I played with Cristiano Ronaldo at Man Utd - and I can see him returning again'
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo’s second spell at Manchester United ended in explosive fashion ahead of a move to Al-Nassr and he has now been backed to make yet another return to Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Red Devils 'open' talks with World Cup-winning forward
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly eyeing up a summer move for Paris Saint-Germain attacker Ousmane Dembele, who is keen on a switch to Old Trafford next season.

arts.ttl: How Enzo Maresca has impressed new Chelsea signing Jadon Sancho
arts.sum: Jadon Sancho joined Chelsea from Manchester United this summer and his career is off to a decent start. The English winger won Man of the match award on his debut against Bournemouth for his fine performance. The former Borussia Dortmund winger assisted the winner late in the game for the Blues. arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Barnsley – League Match Preview
arts.sum: Manchester United turn their attention to Carabao Cup action on Tuesday night, as the Red Devils welcome League One outfit Barnsley to Old Trafford. arts.ttl: Man United 'hand' Erik ten Hag deadline to avoid the sack
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly not willing to give Erik ten Hag any assurances over the safety of his job until improvements are seen on the pitch in the near future.
